There is a bit of renovation going on to the outside of the Hotel but this does not in any way impact on your stay   Where to start Firstly this beautiful hotel is situated in Knightsbridge directly opposite to Harvey Nicholls and 100 meters away from Harrods My room looked out over Hyde Park and it was an amazing experience to wake up to The staff is amazing and they made me feel like I was an old friend From the welcome of the reception team to the friendliness of the food and beverage team I felt pampered on every occasion The concierge team was probably the best I have experienced in the 91 countries I have travelled to They arranged shopping for me for me from a sports shop not close by and were fantastic in getting us a booking at NOPI restaurant on the day The rooms are very comfortable and the bed is one of the most comfortable I have ever slept on Well done to the entire team

Its hard to be perfect i know but simple things such as not letting rooms out that are within direct earshot of the very noisy renovation would be a good start Having to pay for WiFi access in this type of hotel is nonsense high room rates set this hotel apart from all others so to charge for something so trivial seems petty   The staff Superb From arriving at the front door to leaving the next day simply exceptional service Even when things were not quite right the situation was dealt with in a polite efficient and courteous manner that was much appreciated The food in the restaurant was of the highest quality and a real treat to the taste buds once again the service was impeccable Location is excellent only a stones throw away from Harrods and all the bling of Knightsbridge with Harvey Nichols directly opposite the hotel But the real star for this hotel has to be the staff 10 out of 10

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Staff was super friendly and helpful Also free wine tasting at their partner hotel across the street and free absinthe every night from 6 8 pm The hotel was so comfortable and chic with great restaurants within walking distance About 1 2 miles from tourist destinations but the walk is very easy and enjoyable

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Air conditioning was not working Also had problems with accepting my bank cards but we managed all issues with smile   This is cozy small hotel The location is very good as it is close to the metro station and it is very easy to navigate in the rue Blanche Despite the location is close to the Mulen Rouge and rue de Clichy it was quiet safe My room was small but very clean and nicely decorated Very nice and pleasant staff ready to solve your small problems in a very polite and agreeable manner Big thanks for additional cooler to my room I was staying probably the hottest night this summer and of course old building and old systems are not ready to cope with this heat Reception managed me a cooler to the room so I was lucky enough and had good sleep Big plus of Happyculture chain free of charge coffee and water in the lobby This already 3rd hotel of the chain I am staying I like it

Full_Review: We had a room 306 May 12 14 The cleaning wasn t great   Many thanks to the lady at reseption who did our check out yesterday morning 14 05 Everything was great

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Lighting in our room had dark areas We couldn t understand how to work the coffee maker in the room   All staff were exceptionally welcoming and helpful We also loved the quirky but attractive accommodation

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: This is a small hotel so doesn t have too many staff Not all staff spoke english either so I had to wait to check in for an english speaking member of staff I waited for close to an hour after being told I could check in at 2pm It was a little frustrating after a morning of travel Staff were eager to please but don t expect the exceptional service you might get from a bit chain I guess that is why you choose this place Lots of character fabulous location and very easy to access and all the perks of a small boutique hotel Just misses that polish you get from some very well oiled hotels I d stay there again namely for the location and proximity to everything

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: I was told there s no room for me after confirmed my resevation a day before Even you have my contact no email no phonecall nothing How would you like if you travel one hours train and half hour taxi only want to rest and when you arrive your hotel no room Are you just expecting me enjoy the way you welcome and enjoy your happy culture Thank you for paying a taxi to take me to another hotel but this wont make me comfortable anymore Hope you can do better

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Tiny bathroom very small Some works going on on the hall to the rooms Definitly this is not a 4 star hotel   Breakfast and comfortable beds Nice staff Excelent location considering our purpose Molin Rouge show

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: The breakfast was standard for the money And my neighbours were smashing their doors   The location is perfect quiet and central The staff is really friendly The rooms are lovely and clean There are supermarkets nearby and lot of boulangeries In this hotel your experience in Paris will be greater

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Cannot think of anything if there was I would say  Comfortable stay nice lounge area staff lovely the lady at breakfast time chat and helpful loved it all

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: My son was sick in Paris I was in Australia and I found this hotel on the internet at an hour notice The lovely receptionist found a doctor during a public holiday had the doctor at the hotel within an hour of him arriving I couldn t rate this hotel any higher for caring

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: The location wasn t great on the backstreets of moulin rouge you were kept awake all night by the constant whistling of the women in the building facing Rooms were tiny and even though we booked a twin room only a double bed was provided and even though it was only 5 in the afternoon we were told all the waiting staff had went home so we had to do this ourself We asked for extra bedding 6 times and only on the 6th time did they actually bring us it   The hotel itself was quite nice the staff seemed perplexed at a lot of the basic questions we asked Where to go shopping what metro to get to famous sites ect

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: No aircondition well sure there is a panel but does not work we averaged a 25 5C temperature in our room No minibar Plastic carpets in the whole room Soundproofed rooms What a laugh never been in a louder hotel room 4 star hotel Try 2 at best   Location is great for Theaters Concert venues etc

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: We loved H tel Jos phine Far from a cookie cutter hotel this unique little haven was a joy to stay in Everything you need is there with comfort cleanliness helpful staff and all with a lashing of imagination and beautiful boutique style It is also in an excellent location for transport Pigalle Metro is only a few minutes walk

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Did not like being put in a room where the air conditioning did not work especially since it was so hot and humid out They did move us once we complained Another couple travelling with us had the exact same experience   The young woman at the front desk was the best aspect of Hotel Josephine She was extremely friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: the air con was struggling with a very hot July  funky rooms lovely staff small so felt very friendly good location close to the tube and some decent places to eat locally and just a short walk to rue des Martyrs where we discovered the best ice cream shop in Paris Glaces Glazed

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Air con not working but fan provided Work was being done and would start very early in the morning   Staff were very friendly and eager to help It s right next to the moulin rouge if you are seeing a show it s very handy Lovely decor

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: staff was very helpful we had a great time and could travel late at nite and not be afraid to walk back alone as it was close by to the metro we were 3 women

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Some areas were a little shabby and could needed redecoration Room especially the bathroom was very small but adequate Corridors were very narrow and smelt quite stale The exterior of the building was covered in scaffolding so obviously they are starting with the modernisation I feel they should have started with the inside rather than the outside   Very different very french Comfortable bed and lovely breakfast both hot and cold food Staff were very pleasant and helpful Liked the happy hour with free drinks in the evening

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Scaffolding on the hotel when we visited additional taxes that we weren t overly aware of when we booked  Good location friendly and helpful staff decent breakfast

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Room is too small Wifi connection poor Works outside the building which you can see people walking right outside your window Room is bit cold even though had a electric heater  Five mins walk to Lafayette and 2 mins to moulin rouge good location hot and power shower

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: You can see that it just passed as a 4 star hotel Okay 4 star good 3 star hotel I could hear construction and people above me   Staff friendly check in was quick Overall okay

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Better to have a real Coffee machine in the room  The staff are very Friendly and the room are very clean The location is great near to the metro station Place de Clichy and the rooms are very quiet I like this position

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Staff could not have been more helpful breakfast was great location excellent and good value for money as travelling with two teenage boys and mother in law we needed three rooms so it soon becomes dear We had a double and two connecting family rooms it was great

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Scaffolding up outside hotel Staff told us they were painting but woken up at 9 00 by workmen hammering and walking past window on scaffolding Had to shut curtains when they on balcony chipping away at concrete Shame   lovely hotel with character

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Very small room The hotel is renovated but not entirely through my room door you could see the aisle the heating system is incredibly old etc Breakfast is very poor with the exception of the freshly squeezed orange juice   Friendly staff and modern bathrooms Not bad for Paris

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Building work woke us up on 3 of our 4 mornings Scaffolding right outside the window with workers walking along mean lack of privacy   Breakfast was great Proximity to metro also great

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Nothing   Staff friendly and helpful Breakfast excellent Free coffee was welcome Decor was quirky and fun The atmosphere was welcoming and very pleasant I would happily return

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: The bed is really hard SUPER LOUD if you are facing the street I woke up every hour The room is very worn paint chipping on the walls everywhere shower leaking ceiling pealing etc   The lobby is beautiful Staff really friendly

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Only downside was there was obviously some maintenance work going on as scaffolding was being put up from very early every day   The hotel was fab felt quite safe as a solo female traveller Rooms were compact but clean with comfy large beds Also well equipped with hairdryer coffee machine safe etc Staff were all really helpful and friendly would definitely recommend staying at this hotel

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Most helpful friendly staff Monica and Rafaelle were a warm smile on a cold and wet day on our arrival The hair dryer that was found for our daughter s wet hair without request by reception after arriving early from the airport to drop our bags was indicative of the staff intention to go above and beyond Excellent Breakfast Vibey Location short walk from transport services and Moulin Rouge

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Very friendly staff great location Room was clean and everything worked Great all around French hotel 2 blocks from the Moulin Rouge and Blanche Metro stop

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Small room Very small toilet No room in bathroom or by the sink for toothbrush cosmetics etc very hot in room central heating on 24 hours without the possibility to turn it off or set it differently  Great location Lovely staff Good breakfast Nice happy hour All very gentle and generous

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: The walls are thin so you can hear other guests if they are loud   Location is brilliant Right near Moulin Rouge and excellent travel links The room was huge and the staff were very helpful They also have a serve yourself bar and free cocktails between 6pm and 8pm which was pretty unique

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: The staff is professional and helpful The room is comfortable and well decorated I really enjoy the fresh orange juice in the breakfast and coffee in the mini bar everyday

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: As usual in Paris rooms are pretty small The staff at reception was not the most professional one both during the night of my arrival and the morning of my departure   Modern clean and comfortable Breakfast includes freshly squezzed orange juice that made my day

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Room was insufferably hot AC totally ineffective even in November with rads off Room has no shower although has a deep bath   good location good breakfast helpful staff

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: The two connecting rooms were both very small I guess this is Paris but still   1 Breakfast was unexpectedly good unexpectedly goes to say that in such category hotels you get a decent breakfast but you don t expect wonders Without wanting to overstate things this was really a good to very good breakfast proposition Important parameter you can press your own fresh orange juice That to me speaks volumes a you don t get this even in some higher rated hotels 2 Bathrooms were recently renovated and are at a very good standard better than the rest of the room 3 Staff were very helpful when we needed to call a doctor for our daughter they called themselves as it was impossible for us to go over the phone through the french menu of SOS Medecin Doctors SOS and ask for a doctor to come to the hotel Thank you gents

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: The wifi is a real pain one of the worst I ever experienced complicated to log in having to re log in again and again irregular frequently cutting It s unbelievable that they don t fix it If you need wifi for work pass your way this isn t your place   Good location between Montmartre and St Lazare Bus stop right in front of the hotel Good breakfast for the price fresh orange for juice fresh fruits different yoghurts varieties of tea and pastries cheese and ham eggs and sausages cereals etc Good restaurants nearby Very kind and professional personal

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: The bar in the lobby You can help yourselves to drinks which is a lovely idea but the prices are twice the price of a bar where they would be serving you the drink No water at this bar that was complimentary even though Tap water is drinkable I had to drink from at tap in the toilet to take some medication Or go all the way back to my room Not such a bad thing but it Just annoyed me   The decor of the hotel and rooms The location was perfect for us Our AC didn t work and we were visiting in the heatwave they gave us a different room and it was all good The main receptionist was brilliant and very helpful

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Although room was big there was a distinct lack of shelving or storage for clothes Wifi was extremely slow to the point of being unusable   Good location near to Monmartre and the Blanche Metro so easy to get anywhere in the city Room was a really good size with aircon Breakfast was good value when paid for at the hotel

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: Great hotel in great location less than 5 minutes from Blanche Metro around 20 from Gare du Nord Staff were super friendly breakfast good value for money free absynthe cocktail was a bonus Would 100 recommend a 100 go back We had a top floor room bed v comfy all really clean The complementary bathroom bits were also ace

Hotel_Name: H tel Jos phine by Happyculture
Full_Review: hotel staff so very pleasant and helpful stayed here last year and will be booking for next year

Not suitable for someone with knees problems the shower was in the tube and the tube was to high for my knees lots of ways and turns to go from the entrance to the room   The staff was really very nice and helpful

See above  TV broken room small could open bathroom door more than half way cannot sit on toilet without knees touching wall Squeeze around toilet to get to shower hairdryer lead too short to reach mirror which was tucked in alchove Chaos at breakfast glad to leave Terrible hotel

Room was a bit crowded because sofa was turned into second bed There isn t much shelf space in the bathroom During our stay there was twice false fire alarm in the morning I was told that those occurred because someone had taken too long hot shower Hmmm On those mornings breakfast was crowded since every customer had woken up at the same time   Perfect location excellent underground connection to Heathrow Nice quiet room first floor facing street Very good breakfast yogurt fresh fruit and berries fruit juice coffee tea croissants eggs bacon beans sausages grilled mushrooms and tomatoes various seeds etc Excellent helpful personnel cheers Eva Lee and Yustyna It was nice to read and relax at bar with free drinks on each evening apparently this offer depends on what room you have extra points for that The museums are near as are several restaurants
The room was tiny you could not swing a cat the smallest bathroom I have ever seen The hot food on the buffet table was cold and over cooked  Plenty of choice for breakfast off the cold table

I booked breakfast using Booking com but it was not on my booking Room was fine but smelled musty the first night On the second night it smelled as if a drain were blocked I was very tired so did not ask to change Room was a good size and bed was comfortable Hotel was understaffed or so the staff said Staff seemed to have difficulty understanding requests in a English

If you have a standard room as our friends had the rooms can be exceedingly small some of the smallest I have seen even though you could be paying up to 220 pounds a night The prices in the bar and restaurant were high so I would eat and breakfast at one of the places around the corner or take the train from Gloucester road station and go elsewhere As we had a deluxe room we took the option of paying an extra 15 each for breakfast at the hotel restaurant but the breakfast was a bit ordinary for the price so next time we would breakfast at a local cafe   On first arrival the reception staff were very helpful and allowed us to access a room early after a very long flight We were very grateful However when we returned after a few days elsewhere the front desk staff were unhelpful about getting any access and a bit officious so message is it depends on who you encounter The building the hotel is in is very beautiful with rooms down narrow winding corridors We had a very nice room both times of decent size and quiet and comfortable but we paid for a deluxe room The location of this hotel is excellent if you want to do the V A museum and natural history museum which is straight up the road
Bathroom a little tired  Comfy bed big room Great breakfasts plenty of choice Initial problem with room allocation resolved promptly and professionally thanks Adam
The room was dated and needed a bit of a facelift to match the rest of the hotel and it was supposed to have been a deluxe room   Staff excellent great stay

We booked double room but was not available but upgraded us to two superior single rooms So no real complaints And rooms were next door to each other   Bed was super comfy staff very friendly and available at all times for any questions we had Made to feel very welcome and the service was lovely

My single room 148 was advertised as having a fridge and B O TV it had neither Room service did provide a large ice bucket on request The 24 TV s HDMI sockets were locked out so I couldn t use my PS4 It is best to describe the wardrobe as a hanging space basically a shelf mounted to the wall with a hanging rack under it Other than reaching the very high shelf there is nowhere for smaller items The room was VERY small indeed despite the ensuite bathroom having a full sized bath with shower overhead you couldn t close the bathroom door it caught on the bottom of the bed Ok for sleeping in but that s about it Nothing much of a view out of the window I d pay a little more for a better room next time I assume the more expensive rooms do have a fridge and a better TV Still 150 for a room in that part of town wasn t awful considering it included breakfast which was 20 if paid for separately   Nicely presented and clean Staff were friendly breakfast was very good and it was quiet In a good location only 2 3 minutes walk from Gloucester Road tube with lots of shops supermarkets and restaurants nearby The air conditioning was a bit 1980 s no auto temperature hold but it kept the room at a reasonable temperature considering it was 30C outside Room had an iron ironing board and a safe Reasonable number of power sockets There are a bunch of hotel movie services at fairly reasonable prices about 4 to rent a film It is like a rabbit warren to find your room but does have a lot more character than many hotels Make sure you check the fire escape route as it was not that obvious

We always have a great time here Excellent location and great service management The hotel might be better suited for a bit older kids rather than toddlers We went to patisserie Paul every morning just around the corner for the best breakfast croissants and coffee The hotel breakfast is quite good too but not worth the money to be honest Bonus they have great fish n chips in the hotel restaurant The cutest area for evening strolls is South Kensington a 5 7 min slow walk or 2 stops with the bus where you can find good restaurants and great ice cream open late When reserving a room ask for a newly refurbished executive room they are great

When we arrived the staff was unable to give us a room with two beds as we had requested with our reservation Instead they offered two single rooms next to each other and included breakfast at no extra charge Although the offer was okay one of the two rooms was so so small There was no closet or armoire nowhere to place the suitcase and only one available electrical outlet Although the staff subsequently offered a replacement room upon request the tiny room should not have been offered in the first place   Location is excellent

Stuffy rabbits warren hellish to get to my room with luggage My room was the smallest I have had in London and stuffy Dark wallpaper made the place sombre My towel rack was designed so that all my towels would fall and slip into the toilet below it It took 3 calls and 2 hours to get more towels Would not stay here again   The staff were very friendly and very courteous

Room needs redecorating Lifts awful slow and small and we were on the 4th floor Loo did not flush properly The pressure in the shower was a joke  Breakfast excellent Public spaces are lovely and very comfortable

The room was cramped and the property is served by only 2 small lifts which meant lots of time wasted waiting on them being free as these were for use by customers and service staff   Location great bed really comfortable and bathroom fine

Breakfast no one greeted me had to seat myself then someone came over and asked me to move without greeting Bit of a scrum to get some food with basic breakfast foods like eggs and bacon all taken and only slowly replenished Too many people and not enough staff it seems like to serve the guests For the price that is quote poor and I expected better Small room too   Good location

Room service each day very poor as had to complain daily that room not cleaned up to 4 00 despite leaving clean me sign on outside of door I did complain each time but made little difference   Good room after we were upgraded from that which we were originally given as too small and fridge did not work
The lift and the need to use a card to get to the floors even though you had already come through a serurity system   Breakfast excellent and freshly cooked all the cerals were attractively displayed
Room good size but very tired look The remote control for the TV was so dirty that I needed a tissue to pick it up   Lovely and very helpful staff Excellent location Good and varied breakfast buffet

Check in was a little slow   Comfortable place to stay and decent breakfast handy for underground and pleasant stroll to Olympia if you like to walk that is and it s not raining Room was quiet and well equipped with decent curtains that cut out the light

We had an evening meal in the restaurant After placing our order it took 55 minutes for the food to arrive It was very early evening and the restaurant wasn t busy when we arrived at 5pm The food when it did arrive was over cooked and disappointing   Breakfast was good ample selection
All good but single rooms could be a little bigger Made up with a larger single bed Facilities great otherwise   Central location close to tube and Kensington high street and museums
Wish we could stay longer  Staff were really helpful friendly and polite Even when we turned up at 2am after a late delayed flight The bed was SUPER COMFORTABLE
My twin room was comfortable but looked just like any standard room I have stayed in Very over priced   Good breakfast Great location for museums and close to tube station
small room even the upgraded one Small bed  Excellent location in South Kensington next to the station of District line that has direct connection to LHR

There was lack of communication between shifts We ask for transportation to the airport and valets to pick up our luggage fom the afternoon staff and the morning staff knew nothing about these arrangements The transportation arrived 15 or more minutes late don t know because we left with a hailled taxi on our own For the amount that Radisson charges for a room service should be spot on and it wasn t It was friendly and accommodating but then the requests weren t carried out The rooms are small One more minor complaint was that my tv kept going off line I was watching a good movie that I never got to watch to the end The front desk did send someone up to rebout it but 10 minutes later it went off again I then just went to bed   Location

One of the concierge was very unhelpful He was no knowledgeable at all and not very friendly Another concierge was extremely helpful So there was no consistency of service there   The location was exceptional It was half a block away from the tube restaurants coffee shops grocery stores It is on the Piccadilly line which takes you directly to Heathrow in 45 min for a few pounds The room was well appointed and clean They changed our towels every day which was a bonus because with 4 in our room there s no place to hang up all the towel to get dried
Nothing to say bad had a very good experience  A really nice hotel in a great location in Kensington Right next to the tube Breakfast buffet was excellent

They could charge for the room correctly We were charged twice The breakfast is terrible cindered bacon and everything else was cold There was a noisy duct outside our room that went boom every now and then The beds were uncomfortable Booked a double and got twin The check in was chaos The staff are arrogant when we told them about the error on charging the credit card we were told that was good   They serve nice beer

This property is located perfectly for a London vacation The tube stops groceries and restaurants are within a pleasant 5 minutes walk The neighborhood is upscale clean and safe I would be happy to return

My room was perfect in every way but just a little too small but this did not bother me too much as everything else was so nice   The location is near to many of my favorite museums the Vicoria Albert Museum There are many special shops like Egg which are not far from the Hotel Staff is very friendly qnd helpful

The room was incredibly noisy It seemed like there was some kind of plant room right next door so the wall against which the bed was placed was literally humming all night long It was like sleeping in an engine room When we told the reception staff about this upon check out we were basically told that it was our fault for not reporting it and asking to be moved Get real it was after midnight when we got to our room Did they really think that two very tired travellers would be ready to jump out of bed get dressed and race around the hotel to look for another room   Nothing We had such an awful night in a noisy room that I honestly could not find anything to like about this hotel

The noise from the peoples activities in the corridor which was as if they would have had it right in my room  Location cleanliness facilities decor style very good Nice flavoured water with pieces of fresh watermelon or lemon in the lobby

The lift No one would believe the time we had to wait for the ONLY lift to our 4th floor room TWO members of staff told us how busy they were err hellooo I am your customer notmyproblem However having waited TWELVE minutes for a lift we did complain at reception were allocated a ground floor windowless room Would NOT ever stay again Would NOT recommend Attitude of some staff very poor   Bar restaurant was nice

Loads of corridors and stairs to my room that I had no staff help me carry my bags Single female with 30 kgs of luggage was difficult up front stairs and up 2 stair cases to my room Not sure why they put me in a room which was up stairs   Nice clean comfy room

Not having a window with a view  Great location and easy to get to from Paddington via tube which is minutes from hotel Our room was ok very clean tidy and comfortable However as it was on the ground floor we had a frosted glass window with no view which made the room feel a bit claustraphobic in my opinion Breakfast was also good if manic but plenty of choice

I was very disappointed as the twin bed room did not look like what was shown on the website and its size and facilities were unacceptable Had to make a major complaint before being moved to what was called a business room and was only marginally better hardly any storage room minuscule bathroom and broken mini fridge Made was what supposed to be a treat into an upsetting experience  Breakfast great range of food including organic juices

I was moved twice related to the unavailability of a room with a bath for the duration of my stay Victorian winding narrow carpeted passageways with endless closed doors and in some areas the occasional stair or two were very confusing and tiresome to negotiate with luggage There were staff available to assist with same The final upgraded room was clean despite stained carpeting weak air conditioning and no functioning window during the years warmest heat wave The bed was very firm I asked for a topper that made small difference to the rock hard surface Lastly half the lights in the bathroom winked out during a prolonged stay there The glass half partition on the bath was not firmly attached in position and would swing out from the wall during use in both bath rooms I was given and used   Friendly courteous staff Conveniently located close to a moderately priced selection of restaurants The Tube station and Bus Tours stops on the corner

Room was poor standard considering it was an executive arrived at 16 20 to find room still not ready despite booking at least 3 months in advance Prices for room service and drinks were astronomical Food in Scoff and Banter apart from starter was of poor quality especially the burger that stated it came with Lancashire Bomb cheese when in fact it was a square of processed cheese we come from the North of England where Lancashire Bomb is a delicacy The booking stated 15 towards drinks food etc as we booked an Executive room that is 45 that was never offered Having stayed in at least 6 Radisson Blu hotels and have always been very satisfied this one was by far the worst and a great disappointment it was no better than a budget hotel at a ridiculous price The one good comment was the concierge who was on duty when we arrived and Thursday and Friday daytimes as well he was helpful pleasant and a credit to the hotel   Not a lot

Sharing room 336 with a friend we found it very small and the bathroom was tiny To access the room we had to open eight doors mostly fire doors We found this unacceptable Together with the small room bathroom I would not book this hotel again nor would I recommend it   The decor etc was pleasant

The smallest hotel room that we have ever been provided in 40 years of travel Measured of room including a bath room closet and entryway was 10 6 by 11 Would never stay there again because of cramped space   Excellent location very nice attentive staff
The cleaners started very early and were quite noisy outside my room   Comfortable room hotel was very close to the underground staff were very accommodating

Room 442 avoid like the proverbial plague Right opposite the noisy lift and couldn t sleep from 7 30 am onwards due to very loud Americans going down to breakfast and discussing their trips so far If you stay don t stay in this room dreadful And please tell housekeeping that 8 50 is a little too early to be banging on the door to find out if anyone was still in there   Great location and even though on the busy Cromwell Road the rooms were well sound proofed Excellent helpful and welcoming staff Would stay again but

Booked a single and got upgraded to double beautiful room The breakfast was included and is excellent with many choices including smoked salmon Nice wifi great location staff They have a concierge that seemed really helpful to others though I didn t ask for specific help

Only double bed in room although this was as advertised Very few front of house staff on duty at breakfast time for the number of guests leading to delays in table clearing provision of hot drinks etc Our part of the hotel was served by one very slow lift and this caused delays particularly at check out We stayed on floor 4 top floor and as well as slow lift not all levels of the stairs had a handrail  Very friendly professional staff Outside view on side street and not over busy main Cromwell road was appreciated Clean rooms

As is common with buffet breakfast it wasn t always very hot We also couldn t get any bar snacks after 10 30 when we were a little peckish having had an early dinner before going to a show  Croissants were served in a little wooden box with an apricot conserve which was delicious

Very long wait at reception to check in technical problem meant room key couldn t be issued so had to collect later Member of staff on reception when key collected needs to develop his social skills very poor representative of hotel

If you have a stroller you need a hand because the entrance has stairs There is no hand shower in the baths so it is a bit difficult to bath your kids   The hotel is very close to the Glocester Road Tube station and 5 minutes walking distance to South Kensington Tube station You can easily walk to National Museum and Science Museum There are plenty of good restaurants near the hotel and hotels own restaurant is also good It has a nice bar for the evenings The rooms are big enough for families The staff is very helpful and friendly There is a free candy bar and lemon strawberry water stand near the entrance

The tiny bathroom especially for a couple and its shower facility was the only thing that was uncomfortable It was cramped and the shower stream was problematic to adjust   The bed was extremely comfy Breakfast menu was especially tasty with a wide variety of choices The staff was very helpful with maximum efforts to be helpful and efficient We were pleasantly surprised and appreciative of the wine in the ice cold bucket and the complementary rose petal decor and towel swanlike sculpture on the bed along with the lovely welcoming card celebrating our wedding anniversary stay at the hotel As well the complementary box of sweets was a lovely delightful additional touch

a bit of inside noise as my room was situated beside a set fire doors that inevitably banged whenever someone went through   I chose this hotel for the location near metro station Hyde Park museums etc Despite being situated on a very busy road the room was quiet thanks to double glazing I had a single room that was small but comfortable I chose the option without breakfast as there are so many nearby eating places so cannot comment on breakfast or coffee The conceriage really assisted me with urgent photocopying and sending message that was greatly appreciated

It was not value for money at all The room was very small The bathroom was extremely small the door could not be left open while you re in the bathroom The toilet seat was broken and the shower leaked The breakfast for 20 pounds was a rip off the worst cup of tea in London   The bed and pillows were very comfortable

Selection on offer at breakfast really good however most of the hot buffet food was cold which was quite disappointing I wouldn t trust a lukewarm sausage My husband asked for a couple of fried eggs unfortunately they arrived 10 minutes later when he d finished his tepid meal This spoilt our stay   bed was pristine staff helpful service good
The room was very small and the bathroom tiny No Bedside tables or drawers etc Not value of 230 per night Room very dusty and in need of a full clean   Bed was very comfy
No complaints  My room in the rear was nice quiet Big bath Nice sized wardrobe Friendly staff Good breakfast included in price of room Tea making facilities really appreciated

The Dining room for breakfast was a mad house Long lines lousy service not enough staff or space way overcrowded and impossible to get a breakfast Very disappointing  friendly staff other than dining room
Toilet too small Room little small Too many d ors to open to walk to the room with luggage  Best ever Breakfast Best ever blankets and bed also hotel British style
I can honestly say I have nothing to say as the hotel was really great   My family and myself liked everything about this hotel Great location very clean great food

The bathroom towels are dirty with paint the stuff doesn t really respond when I complained about this Air con from other room are noisy and the noise is on and off the whole time which is even more annoying   Good location Some staff are friendly but some just couldn t care your problem as the room fee is paid on the first day

The room is SUPER TINY as compared to all neighborhood hotels whereby even offer cheaper price The breakfast has the SAME menu every single day throughout our 7 days stay The Housekeeper s cleaniliness quality is poor The Bathroom is so small yet the chair is freaking heavy to move around that tiny area There is no bottle opener for guest to enjoy our own purchased wine nor beer guest has to bring the bottle down to open worse facility than 1 star hotel   Free wifi location is great

Bathrooms are small and awkward soap dispenser didn t work tv was not great and only worked some of the time   Fabulous staff complimentary water and coffee great location close to public transportation

Very small single room comparatively spacious wardrobe but no place at all to put small things like t shirts socks etc Please add just a tiny set of shelves in the wardrobe   Very helpful and kind staff all over Lovely breakfast Good location and surroundings very close to the tube

Room wasn t ready at check in despite arriving at after 7pm which we had flagged at reservation stage Check in also took nearly 30mins which is really too long I was also asked to pay for the rooms separately instead of on one charge to my card even though these were booked together Check out also took too long given I d already paid my bill in full and just required a receipt   Superior single room was very spacious for London as was the bathroom Location was excellent as was the breakfast and the restaurant staff

I wasnt fond of the lifts in the hotel quite small can only fit a maximum of 2 people in there along with their bags at a push 3 I also didnt like the shower it was quite disappointing i was expecting a modern shower it also had 2 showerheads in the shower cubicle Room i stayed in was 117   Little touches they did to the room to make it more personalised a little card on the dressing table with my name in and a little welcoming message along with a pack of complimentary gummy bears which was really tasty
The room and bathroom were very tired and in need of some updating   The location near a tube station and close to the Albert hall The reception staff were helpful and welcoming

One of the best hotels I have ever visited The room was tiny but neat and a great bathroom with a tub my first in Europe I booked a tiny room as it was all I could afford but the staff treated me very first class They were incredibly accommodating the restaurant is excellent and inexpensive the breakfast over the top

We were kept waiting 70 minutes after advertised check in time because the room wasn t ready We were not even offered a cup of tea whilst we waited Room was clean but very small and bathroom was tiny Wouldn t stay again  Location

Small bathroom very small lifts lengthy check in due to computer problems  Very comfy bed lovely white fluffy towels very good breakfast selection friendly helpful staff only 3 min walk from tube station
Coffee never arrived at breakfast and I was in a rush so just left without coffee  Eggs cooked to perfection Gina guest services was extremely helpful and polite and a great ambassador for the hotel

Nothing really I had a problem of reaching up to get the hand and bath towels in the bathroom as I am short and they are located above the toilet But apart from that all was great   The staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful
The room was too small i asked the the guy at the reception and he said the rooms in the forth floor are the biggest when i visited my friends in other rooms there rooms were big and comfy

The service in the bar was a little strange The staff didn t seem to understand what a splash meant in the whisky so my husband didn t get any water added to his whisky and we had to remind them that we needed to pay The service at breakfast was very poor I asked for tea but whilst I was away from the table selecting my breakfast the tea was delivered to the table When I returned I found that there was no milk I went in search but found nothing My husband asked a member of staff and they said they would bring it I had almost finished my breakfast when I fetched some orange juice as I was now desperate for a drink My husband asked for a SECOND time and eventually milk was delivered to the table This was such a shame as the food and everything else about the hotel was very good but this spoilt the overall experience as it was the last impression we had of the hotel as we left   The staff were generally very friendly and helpful The room was comfortable and clean The food for breakfast was very good with a good selection Good location for the Royal Albert Hall only a 10 minute walk away

The only down side was that the bed was very hard   The staff are very friendly and efficient at this hotel The included breakfast is pretty extensive The location was ideal for me near the underground and a short walk to the Royal Albert Hall
As I did not take any cooked breakfast the remainder of the breakfast choice was good   Room was very satisfactory Cooked breakfast did not look very appertising Staff very helpful

Our Room 105 was adjacent to the hotel s main electric generator whose noise kept us awake all night We asked for a change which we got and adequate compensation for the noise The room we were moved to was quiet but very small

It s a big hotel with so many rooms and my room happened to be in an area you need to go up and down the stairs for about 10minutes from the reception area I think you just have to enjoy this little adventure   Their system lets you choose the room you like very limited choice though one room per floor a couple of days in advance so you can check in before you actually arrive My selected room was ready and the notification came before 6AM so when I arrived at the hotel around 10 30AM I could pick up the key and enter the room right away which was great Check out is also done online so no waiting in the queue I think this works well for a hotel with so many rooms

The room was quite small I would have liked more room for the money we spent staying there   Staff were extremely helpful lots of little extras for the children such as a teddy on arrival and sweeties in the foyer Close proximity to the family museums and the Albert hall

Not winning the lottery whilst I was there   I had a single room small by U S standards but nicely appointed and clean My bath was luxurious with a deep tub and rain shower My view was the mews in the rear which was fine for me as I requested a quiet room No traffic back there But thinking even a front room would be fine as street is pretty and not heavily traveled in the evening The concierge helped me plan an overnight trip to Devon for a genealogy excursion that was spot on Had never traveled by train and this was the way to go All stuff is extremely helpful and pleasant My last morning there a car had been arranged to Heathrow Also a nice breakfast bag was made for me to have at the airport Must say that location and safety was a huge factor n booking with this hotel as I am a single senior woman
The only real downside was that the front door was on Cromwell Road so no tranquility on the doorstep you had to walk to find space   The hotel was friendly and easy to live in

Original room given smelled very strongly of smoke incredible given the no smoking policy of the hotel which you are made to sign on arrival The room re allocated had a shower SO SMALL it was very uncomfortable and difficult to shower in As we had booked a De Luxe room we expected a much better standard of room The Hot food on the breakfast buffet was COLD on the two mornings we had breakfast ridiculous given the price of the room no fried eggs at breakfast Also had to keep waiting for the food to be replenished as there was insufficient out to cater for the guests Only one choice of draught beer on offer Peroni no choice is very poor for a hotel of this standard The service charge that applies to every purchase at the bar regardless needs to be clearly explained at check in and not just appear on your bar statement Overall a very disappointing stay at a central London hotel  The Location and not much else

All towels changed daily despite being left on the hot rail which was supposed to signify that they would not need changing Same for the cup changed daily Not environmentally friendly in my opinion The shower was also overheating There was no possibility of regulating the water temperature   Location customer service breakfast online check out virtual assistance comfortable bed

The hotel was clean and comfortable with plenty of paid extra services available to the guests The free wi fi signal was strong and accessible from all parts of the hotel The location was fabulous just 2 minutes walk for the Natural History museum The staff were welcoming and friendly and the check in out process was efficient and painless
There was no remote control for the TV which made it a bit fiddly   Warm welcome modern bathroom fantastic breakfast with the best marmalade I have ever tasted

Corridors are very narrow and you have to go through a number of doors to get to your room I wouldn t recommend this hotel if you have special accessibility needs  Very close to the tube station in a good part of London for sightseeing

better lift access to top floor bathrooms a little squeezy  Great location on the Piccadilly Line so easy access to central London and LHR all the staff were very friendly great light food available after a long day exploring comfy room

There was a huge mass of hair in the bath plughole gross only found because the plughole was blocked I did mention this to the concierge upon our checkout but the gentleman merely shrugged and said sorry but offered nothing by way of compensation The distance to the room was extremely long and we shown a further access route with suitcases wasn t greatly appreciated   The bed was amazing and the room was lovely didn t bother keeping the dressing gowns at 90 each a little bit extortionate Loved the breakfast gorgeous

The room was uncomfortably tiny and did not even have a bedside table and lamp The water flow of the shower was also rather pathetic   The staff were lovely and the choice for breakfast was impressive
Nothing to mention   Very nice hotel excellent location very nice building and interior decorated with good taste Nice breakfast Very helpful personnel I would be more than glad to stay there again

Bed very hard children s sofa beds very squeaky which disturbed everyone in the night Decor of the hotel very dark which makes it feel oppressive as the corridors are so narrow Bedroom decor very dated for the price of room I expect a higher standard   good selection at breakfast

Only one small gripe as the bar didn t have either sherry or port  Excellent location for Royal Albert Hall Could have easily walked but taxis are plentiful and can be picked up right outside the hotel Cost for a taxi to and from Waterloo was 17 each way Bed was extremely comfortable Staff were very helpful and welcoming Prices for dinner were reasonable Breakfast was particularly good great selection and all very fresh Would definitely return and would recommend to friends

I was unable to take a shower at 6 30am as the water was cold By 7 am it was fine The single room was really too small It was difficult to move freely   The shepherd s pie with red wine sauce was very good The staff were co operative and pleasant Breakfast was excellent
Room slightly small and bland  Excellent position as wanted to be close to Royal Albert Hall Excellent Breakfast Staff ver pleasant and helpful Bed very comfy
Both guests couldn t use Wifi without registering with reception I couldn t work out why we kept losing connection   Breakfast was very good Staff were helpful

Scrum for breakfast and food stone cold even brought out cold Our room was worse one possible Room 7 by the corridor door Very noisy We stayed last year and room upstairs was lovely and food hot hence us choosing again Very very disappointed this time for noisy room and cold breakfast  Evening meal Good menu

The staff were extremely welcoming and made me feel at home The food is excellent and the dining room is light and spacious I was given a very quiet room as requested The hotel is very close to the tube station
The room was really comfortable especially bet mat I slept really well It is also equipped with a fridge and an electric kettle The staff was kind

The noise of the airco in the rooms which could not be switched off Although the staff reacted accurately to the complaint the problem could not be solved which resulted in two sleepless nights   Location breakfast and style of the hotel are excellent
Decor on entry beautiful staff very helpful food excellent Room was lovely front view so that was lovely Location excellent Great hotel great experience

Our shower went from boiling hot to freezing cold constantly Was not what we expected for the standard of the hotel and i didnt find the staff very bothered when we told them And there was also a shaving blade left in there by the previous visitor so cleaning hadnt been done very well either  The restaurant was outstanding We had dinner and breakfast and were very impressed

We were disappointed with the cleanliness of the room The room was also quite tired and a little small   Location was great as we were seeing a concert at the Royal Albert Hall which was within easy walking distance and close to the tube as well
Couldn t sleep in the bed which was two singles pushed together to make a double resulting in a dip in the middle Made for an uncomfortable night s sleep   Location friendly staff

The breakfast was too expensive so had to eat out However plenty of local shops to get from WiFi was very poor   Comfortable big family deluxe room Nice surprise of getting a 15 daily credit at the bar and welcome chocolate strawberries in our room
Can t fault anything on our visit from our point of view   Excellent room quiet friendly staff wonderful breakfast that was fresh appetising with non greasy bacon Perfect location at a fair price

We were in late for breakfast no bacon available Croissants were dry so ordered Eggs Benedict and poached eggs were hard So everything else about hotel was good except breakfast Should be same whether you go in at 7 30 or 9 30   location room helpful staff Overall a good value hotel in a great location I would consider coming again

The bathrooms are dated and smaller than what I would have expected compared to the size of the room   Great location as we went to see a show at the Royal Albert Hall which was only a 10 15 minute walk Staff were pleasant and polite and the business class room was an excellent size We were on the ground floor but very little noise from the road We ve previously stayed in the deluxe king room which is quite small for deluxe but all amenities are there

Small lift meant a wait at busy times Bathroom was small and room was not as clean as I would have expected carpet needed replacing or a deep clean   Bed and pillows were very comfortable Staff were helpful Good location for museums and Royal Albert Hall

Personnel wasn t aware of the price of hotel taxi   Breakfast was versatile and good Personnel was kind and helpful Rooms were spacious and it was kind gesture from personnel to offer complimentary mineral water bottles for each day The situation of the hotel was near to underground and Natural History Museum as well as some quality restaurants
Replenishment of complimentary tea coffee could have been better Small bedroom and bathroom   Very friendly and helpful staff Nice quality breakfast

Unfortunately our experience was ruined by the fact that I left my make up bag full of rather expensive make up and my watch on the bathroom shelf and by the time I realised this when I got home that evening they were mysteriously nowhere to be found Very bad taste as I know that I left them there and they were not handed into lost property by the cleaning staff   This hotel is in a great location and although rooms were rather small it s what you d expect from an average hotel in London so was pretty good value for the price we paid

First room was by some noisy air con units staff very helpful and changed the room Unfortunately the second room also had similar units outside but not quite as noisy Have stayed there several times may look elsewhere in the future   Excellent breakfast selection

Nothing  The location is great 2 min walk to the tube station Very easy to take tube a few stops to sites Staff very welcoming and helpful with dinner recommendations and tips for shopping Very clean and I felt super safe traveling alone there Would stay again

Very long corridors I need to open 9 doors to reach my room If you have kids you can ask for a room closer to lifts   Location was great It is very close to the Gloucester Road station It is also very convenient and cheap to reach the hotel from Heathrow airport via Piccadilly line I also recommend to include breakfast It was great

Room was fine for 1 night bathroom was clean but tired and shabby in places Lighting in room was very bright no lamps  Location was great Good choice at breakfast Easy to check in and out on line Good toiletries
Single room felt small and ventilation fan was relatively intrusive   Comfortable bed and quality bed linen Great breakfast choices Bathroom great compared to those in single rooms of other hotels

The Shower needed updating but adequate enough  Everything The hotel was amazing The staff so helpful and friendly the location for the underground fantastic The breakfast loads to choose from and eat as much as you like We asked for something for the room and it was replaced within five minutes They even left a bottle of wine in our room when I told them it was my birthday Great place to stay We asked for and got a quiet room Loved it Good location for shops and restaurents

The room had a poor layout the shower did not maintain constant temperatures and there were no biscuits with the tea coffee facilities which I would expect at the bare minimum for this quality and price  Breakfast was good quality of the linen was very good and staff were very friendly and helpful

Coffee cups at breakfast were stuck to the saucers need drying up properly   Lovely staff I was attending the BAFTAs and forgot my cuff links When I enquired if I could buy some the member of staff Julia took off her own and lent them to me What extraordinary service
Condition of room was tired and poor do not expect 4 quality Bath was dirty toilet stained net curtains yellowed with age bathroom was tiny service was awful   The restaurant food was good
The room is a little small but still very comfortable   The location is brilliant the staff are super friendly and I really loved the charm of the hotel

We were greeted by the head concierge Jubril who was wonderful he was so welcoming full of information and very helpful couldn t have asked for better The hotel is located just 5min walk from The Natural History Museum Harrods was within walking distance too lovely place to stay Thank you

There is no shuttle service from or to the airport I had to pay around 45 for one way Taxi service I requested for a wake up call on the day I was traveling back which I never received The hotel prearranged Taxi service did not show up on time on the day i was traveling back   The hotel staff was very nice and helpful Breakfast was good and breakfast service staff was so helpful and jolly The hotel is very near from Hop On Hop Off bus stop and from the Underground station Many restaurants are near the hotel A museum is within the walking distance

service charge at the bar was steep and the breakfast was a free for all the food was great but the service needs looking at 20 minutes for coffee untidy tables   the hotel location is brilliant checking in and out staff were helpful and cheery room was good but the bathroom was a little snug

Hotel had amazingly little to offer in the room no water boiler coffee tea no night lamp beside the bedside and the sewage was not functioning well and the room was cold I was not impressed and the hotel really wasn t up to the standards of 4 stars   Good location near to the underground Friendly staff
We had a much bigger room last visit after complaining about the tiny split level room we had during first stay we have paid the same amount each time for three completely different rooms   Location

Part of the charm of the hotel is its age but having to travel up and down several flights of stairs and corridors to get to our room was a bit of a pain  Staff were very helpful cheerful and friendly and the location was perfect

Pull out sofa bed was uncomfortable for my teenagers squeeky Only bad thing as everything else was fantastic  Decor of hotel room 15 off after checking in Cosy feel lighting seating areas bar area Food was outstanding plenty to choose from Staff were helpful welcoming Great location Considering it was on a busy road as are most hotels it was very quiet inside allowing for a peaceful nights sleep Also a nice touch was having complimentary toiletries towels robes slippers even an umbrella to borrow

1 Mini bar in room not clean really dirty on arrival and not working We had to ask 4 times to have it fixed after 2 days 2 House keeping coming to our room during breakfast and throwing our medication from the night table but not cleaning anything I was thinking I got crazy before the cleaning lady gave me back my medication pills She took it back for the hotel general garbage Waouhhh 3 Mattress too soft for us 4 Toilet inside not really clean Please use chlorine   1 Good breakfast 2 Nice staff 3 Good location

The room wasn t clean upon checking in the room size and layout wasn t as described on the site with the room layout being smaller The facilities shower leaked onto the floor as the shower guard wasn t sealed or placed properly   Location and breakfast

The rooms were shabby and need of a refurb the reception and restaurant were nicely decorated but as soon as you used the lift to the rooms the standard dropped very disappointing  The breakfast was excellent and friendly serving staff

That annoying low handle on the door to the right after the main second entrance I m short so imagine the tall people   Stayed for a night for my interview the next day Single bed comfortable more than enough pillows Small table with one chair a single cupboard TV had enough channels Other facilities include hairdyer iron ironing board Toilet new and clean With more than enough toiletries Wifi great Ready and printed on welcome card Breakfast full English breakfast with choices of pastries fruits and salads Location 2 3minutes away from Gloucester Road Staff service excellent even though they seemed perpetually busy

Room bed size was very small and room tired Much better options in the area if you book in advance I also had rung earlier in the day to request an earlier check in and they confirmed it would we were running late and room wasn t even ready at 3pm the actual check in time   Location is good

The restaurant was a disappointment My husband was served a very burnt pie and the waiter said just ignore that it would take too long to make you another one We aren t fussy about food and he was happy to eat the pie it would ve been nice if it had come with an apology or a little off the bill Our cutlery wasn t changed in between courses but other tables were our drinks order was incorrect and we waited over an hour for dinner About 9pm on Saturday night a cleaner knocked on our door for no particular reason They ended up getting us some more milk which was wonderful but we were allready in bed at that stage and it seemed a little strange and intrusive Around 11pm we were woken up by what I think was a fire alarm going off in the building We were given numerous passes to our room 5 in total but only 1 worked the whole time Having said that the hotel staff were always willing and happy to help   The room was lovely and the staff were very helpful it was great have a later checkout We really appreciated that

The hotel isn t child friendly Only 1 small lift and plenty of doors to go through to get to our room Our double bed was 2 beds pushed together so there was a clear dip in the middle Our friendly staff gave us the wrong directions to an alternative local tube station   Quite conveniently located near to tube station and a variety of shops and restaurants The staff were friendly

this hotel is NOT suitable for wheelchair users the contraption for access is juddery and unsteady I ended up shuffling up the steps myself The stay was a gift and had been booked by my parents on their credit card but it was collected against mine despite instructions not to do this   the bed was comfortable and the breakfast good

We were upgraded to a deluxe twin room on check in which was really nice but I was surprised that this room was very cramped with a tiny bathroom which required updating   All the staff we met right from front desk and everywhere else in the hotel were just lovely The free wifi was excellent Breakfast was very good and the dining room was light and airy which made for a very nice start to the day Cleanliness was very good Our hotel room was very quiet and the hotel location is perfect for South Kensington and all surrounding amenities and very convenient to get to from Heathrow

The room was extremely cold when we arrived and it took ages to heat up The bathroom was a huge disappointment as we were told it was a upgraded room It was so small you could barely sit on the toilet This room could have certainly done with refurbishment   The historic era of the building had been kept well All the staff were pleasant and helpful Great location for our needs
For some reason I did not find the bed very comfortable but I was the only one complaining in the room   well maintained clean and cosy Great location

Room was very small and cold Twin beds were put together so they slanted towards middle mattress was too hard bathroom tiny and dated Shower gel dispenser was broken I did not enjoy my stay there at all   Location

There were cooked to order options for Breakfast but I did not realise as I was directed to the Buffet breakfast by staff and did not see the menu until after I had started eating Scambled egg was cold   Upgraded to a double room with a MASSIVE bed Requested early check in and got that too Very friendly helpful staff on Reception in the restaurant at Breakfast and the team doing the rooms in the morning Fab location just steps away from Gloucester Road tube
Poor room with bathroom down steps Very small bathroom and not particularly clean We were given an upgrade to a family room but could see no benefit in this   Staff were very welcoming
The person who served me Nuno I think was his name was absolutely excellent he even spoke the same language as me definitely helped me and my girlfriend feel settled and welcomed
The restaurant service for our New Year s Eve dinner was deplorable although a manager partially salvaged the occasion with free cocktails   The lobby was tastefully done
the staff was welcoming their smiles and fast checking in after a long flight was great I asked them to upgrade the roome and within less than 5 min I was in the new one

Only my preference a softer pillow   Great location just a few yards from the tube station and then just a few stop from major tourist areas staffs customer service excellent It is a Warren of corridors but the room we found to be fine high ceilings lovely fittings We were able to leave our luggage until we were ready to leave London

Great location within easy walking distance of museums and the Royal Albert Hall which we were visiting on this occasion The buffet breakfast was particularly good fresh varied and a welcome inclusion
Would have liked a bath Afternoon tea could have been better especially considering the price   Bedroom and hotel was great and you felt very secure Great location staff very accommodating

Our evening meal in Scoff and Banter was a little disappointing but breakfast was brilliant   Upon arrival I mentioned it was my husbands birthday we received a free upgrade and then later a bottle of white wine with birthday card from the manager was delivered to our room totally unexpected but a lovely touch and much appreciated
Being woken up by housekeeping at 9 15 We were not due to leave til 11 Have never experienced this in other hotels before  Very friendly staff especially Arrab the waiter in the restaurant

Breakfast was cold The room was far too hot even with air con on Staff didn t seem to care even when we complained 3 times about hot room and cold breakfast Bathroom was dated and dirty  Location was good

Internal layout slightly awkward you have to walk through a narrow maze to get to your room The room has excellent facilities but it is on the small side for what it contains   Extremely friendly and effective personnel very beautiful building equipped to a high standard
why do they hide away the tea coffee and kettle in draws why not just leave it on the desk can hear the traffic through the windows if at front of hotel  nice room and bed

Nice staffs taking care of you all the time I m travelling solo but lucky to got upgrade to a twin room to have more space and window view comfortable bedding Yummy inclusive breakfast delicate English Breakfast and more Simply warm and cozy hotel

Due to option searches I thought there was an airport shuttle here and there wasn t   Because my room wasn t ready when I arrived and I was absolutely exhausted so they put me as priority and even upgraded my room so I could get in as soon as possible Staff was so nice and accomadating
Single room was a little small but enough There was also a fire alarm at 3am which was annoying but nobody s fault really   Amazing breakfasts and lovely lobby Perfect location

The first room was a shock compared to the high standard of the public areas and looked nothing like the photos on the website Not what I expected of a 4 star hotel despite getting a good deal Tiny room for the twin bed booking with a floor that creaked and moved at every step and a somewhat poorly cleaned toilet Complained and was moved to another room and given complimentary breakfast Much bigger comfortable room and better however shame about the outdated dark wood furniture horrible d cor and carpet Bathroom was tiny but manageable and ok if you are big you may not fit same with the lift However again the toilet needed industrial cleaner or replacing Disappointed by both rooms as I deliberately booked a 4 star as I normally stay in 2 3 star hotels and hostels which have had nicer rooms   Location of this hotel is excellent as easy walk to Hyde Park Buckingham Palace Harrods and the museums and nice shops Very impressed by the breakfast choice and excellent quality and liked the bar and cocktails Staff provide good service and were accommodating when I complained about the room and changed it and offered us complimentary breakfast which then made the stay value for money taking into account its location Good size room with potential for improvement Liked the toiletries provided in the bathroom and useful room facilities provided although my son complained about no socket for his mobile phone by the bed

Hope there will be a kettle in each room then customer can boil hot water by themselves The pillow is not really comfortable too soft for me Some plastic bags in bin might be helpful but this is not a big deal   Breakfast is amazing so great staff are very enthusiastic the size for single room for solo travelers is perfect and the location is good as well
Being told I needed move to another hotel despite having a valid booking after a word with the manager I was given possilbly the smallest room I have ever paid 180 for   Good breakfast
Somewhat old fashioned with carpets everywhere but nice and clean   Breakfast was OK Had everything you need including egg bacon sausages etc

Amazing customer service I notified the hotel that I was booking this for my father s 80th birthday and they went well above and beyond my expectations room upgrade bottle of champagne and a surprise dessert with their evening meal Thank you very much
staff gave me an upgrade which i appreciated I was travelling alone and that was my second visit to this hotel staff remembered me and was very nice and helpful

first meal in restaurant I found the menu limited dull mostly fried food menu overpriced and my partner pulled a 300 mm blonde hair from her mouth while eating her meal so we ate elsewhere from then   staff were very good and efficient

The bathroom was small for the size of the room but not sure much can be done about that And also the shower head could be bigger Giving the standard of the room the shower head could use an upgrade Also downstairs slamming of doors was a bit annoying and the loud music from the restaurant could be heard in our room These are all small things that were noticed but nothing too major to disrupt the stay   We were in a newly renovated room and it was lovely Decor was lush bed and pillows was super comfy and the room itself was more than accommodating Room service was delicious and the presentation of the food was fantastic This hotel goes above and beyond to accommodate I have stayed at other hotels in the area and payed more and they don t compare to this hotel Special thanks to Alexander for taking care of us The entire staff is superb

Everything was great However we order a taxi from the airport through the hotel The taxi driver charge us 65 instead of 60 as said by the hotel Plus we order the same taxi driver for the way back and we agreed on 100 to get to Gatwick The taxi driver agreed and when he dropped us off he asked how many are you going to give me so I replied 100 as we said and he replied I would be very happy if you could give me 110 I reply that we agreed on 100 and that we just had that much money in cash He said that we could give him 100 10 I said no as we agreed on the amount before and the driver left us quite angry I thought he was not very honest and left us on a bad impression before taking our plane   The staff was very nice Plus the fact that they were flexible and allowed us to have a late check out without any additional fees We also had a problem with the electricity I signaled it to the staff that immediately sent a technician It was very appreciated Also on December 24th we asked to have dinner at the hotel however it was completely full We were very surprised as nobody told us upon reservation and neither on check in that it was recommended to book the restaurant Finally as I said that we had planned to have dinner there and we were staying at the hotel the restaurant found availability and we could have a great dinner at the hotel Thank you

The room was too small I could barely fit my suit case in Only have one elevator and too small No one did help with the luggage It s my worst experience in hotels world wild  Staff were quit good the location is good

There is not much luxe in a Deluxe room the room is quite small Bathroom is extremely small Chairs are completely worn out you have to use one of the pillows of the bed on the chair to sit decently Lifts are very small and very slow   Location close to tube station Wifi is free and works fast Airco heating works properly

The wifi reception was absolutely comprehensively atrocious Supposedly it was free of charge In actuality it was simply nonexistent   The appearance of the Hotel That was about it It was NOT a good value for the money I expended

We had a blocked sink in our room which was the only negative aspect of an otherwise lovely overnight stay   Staff were excellent throughout from greeting on arrival to departure Room was a good size and very comfortable

elevator was on the small size so difficult to manage with a baby buggy stairs to each floor also just not very spacious corridors   very friendly staff at breakfast lovely clean room staff at reception I found to be very helpful Location very good to get to bus and tube station across the road v nice restaurants around the area I would stay here again
Asked for an early check in but didn t call us   Everything Beds and pillows amazing X staff fab and nothing too much trouble Breakfast was so nicely presented and so fresh

Beds weren t very comfortable No bath in family room Not much room to walk between bed sofa bed when sofa bed was down No plug near mirror for use of hair straighters Very narrow gap between sink wall as step out of shower   Staff were very helpful Nice welcome on arrival option for late checkout Lovely breakfast good choice Bottles of water in room Very clean hotel
the bedroom was very noisy with a metallic grating sound from a large extractor fan outside the bedroom window room 11   the reception staff were very friendly and helpful

I had specifically asked during booking that a lactose free breakfast would be available Other than a jug of soya milk there was nothing I was given gluten free bread and all cereal etc contained milk Also no bedside table or lamp Very tired furnishings Would not recommend to anyone   Staff were very friendly

not changing the hotel 9 mths after we had paid for it it is quite obvious that you sold our reservation to the highest bidder sorry I am very displeased the way you behaved  the fact that you changed our hotel to mercer st one day before we were scheduled to arrive despite the fact that we had already paid for the room 9 month s earlier and this cost us 18 for a taxi to the royal Albert Hall whereas with previously booked radisson we would have been able to walk so not very pleased with the radisson blu company at all and will not be using you again Brgds MR Richard Rawlinson

Breakfast was a bit of nightmare I was not greeted or given a table there was no instructions on how to use the facilities ie please queue for a table I didn t like the baked beans they were bigger than I m used to and spicy not really baked beans at all no choice of eggs not keen on scrambled it wasn t hot either   Gorgeous Room comfy bed and glorious bathroom with fridge and other facilities if the price was right I d definitely stay again
Uncomfortable dining chairs and very small shower room for single use Had to go into bedroom to finish off drying   Location for where I wanted to be and close to underground station

I found that after asking for a quiet room we were situated at the back and there were either air conditioning or heating facilities under our window which disturbed my sleep quite badly and I didn t feel this was a good choice especially after requesting a quiet location Sadly I did not discover the cause of the noise until the next morning when we were checking out   The breakfast was excellent in choice and the staff despite being so busy were very helpful
Room was cramped and poorly appointed Some of the lights were not working There was no bedside light or table Poor water flow from the shower head Very poor value for money
